title: Add XiaoXian ai to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [XiaoXian ai](https://candy535.github.io/XiaoXian/) to chat
- A professional AI chat interface built on the Pollinations API. It supports multi-model switching, deep thinking mode, streaming typing output with a visual cursor, role presets, custom model input, c

Fixes #12301

gist.headline: XiaoXian joins the greenhouse
gist.blurb: A fresh new chat interface just sprouted in the community greenhouse! XiaoXian AI brings multi-model switching, deep thinking mode, and custom role presets to your conversations.
gist.summary: Added XiaoXian AI, a professional chat interface built on the Pollinations API featuring multi-model switching, deep thinking mode, and role presets, to the community apps directory.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use XiaoXian AI from the community greenhouse to experience a feature-rich chat interface with streaming output and custom model inputs.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a new community app called 'XiaoXian AI' (a chat interface) to the 'Greenhouse' (apps directory). Visuals should include the Pollinations bee (Polly) welcoming a new plant or chat-bubble-shaped flower in a cozy greenhouse setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot watering a glowing chat-bubble-shaped flower in a lush digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot watering a glowing chat-bubble-shaped flower in a lush digital greenhouse.
